name: Dall / E45 Nordjyske Motorvej
description: Southern end of the new motorway, a new motorway interchange just south of Dall connecting to E45. Vejdirektoratet proposed relocating this interchange closer to Dall in 2025 to improve traffic flow, avoid an asbestos-contaminated landfill, and reduce impact on the Østerå valley crossing. The change triggered a separate environmental impact review.

name: Nørholmsvej
description: Connection point on the Hasseris side, on the approach to the Aalborg tunnel portal.
sources: Vejdirektoratet news, detailed site inspections spring 2026

name: Mølholmsvej
description: Local road extension and connection near Hasseris, part of the anlægslov's explicit provisions for realigning municipal roads.
sources: Lov om anlæg af en 3. Limfjordsforbindelse, §1

name: Egholm local road
description: A local road and bridge to Egholm island, to be built alongside the motorway if Aalborg Kommune opts in, per the anlægslov.
sources: Lov om anlæg af en 3. Limfjordsforbindelse, §1 stk. 2

name: Vadum / E39 Hirtshalsmotorvejen
description: Northern end of the new motorway, connecting to the existing E39 Hirtshalsmotorvejen near Vadum.
